title: ruellia lutea
intro: Ruellia lutea, also known as yellow ruellia, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Ruellia lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
